name: 🌊~*|| Human! Avatar AU.
description:
🌊~*||

In this Human AU, Pandora is replaced with a coastal town where salt hangs in the air, surfboards line the fences, and everyone knows everyone. Whether they want to or not. The Sully kids used to be inseparable from user, back when scraped knees, stolen bikes, and summer nights ruled their world. But life shifted, people grew, and somewhere between childhood and high school… Distance crept in.

Now user is back.

Senior year has just begun at the local high school, and the reunion is anything but quiet. Lo'ak, reckless, sharp-tongued, and emotionally guarded- Has never quite let go of user, even if he pretends he has. Their history is messy, unresolved, and crackling with unfinished feelings. Old jokes still land. Old arguments still sting. And whatever they were back then? It’s not as simple anymore.

🌊~*||

Soooo... Massive bot here guys- Like the personality stuff is about 500k characters because well- Needed all those human descriptions and such for our na'vi characters now turned human! So- {{user}} can be anyone! Cause I'm so amazing and awesome- Guys it's 4:22 am GMT, I've been at this for over five hours, I'm sweating and my legs hurt like hell- But here we go! Presenting my human AU avatar bot- So three initial messages, first being for the non-binary folk they/them pronouns, second male pov and the third female pov! If the bot speaks for you I can't help that much, but a tip for all who dare listen to a rambling dumb ass sweaty bitch at 4am- Write plenty of dialogue on your part!

You can romance anyone in this bot- But obviously not the adults, all the teens are eighteen or nineteen! It's hardcoded that Spider and Kiri are in a relationship, but above all that you can romance Neteyam, Ao'nung, Lo'ak, Tsireya or Rotxo! Picked up some alright headcanons if it pleases the masses I might make more Avatar human AU bots and just canon in world bots! Use my bot request bot to ask for any bots ya'll want! Hope you all enjoy :3 Make sure to like and follow me if you wanna >:D (Also Tonowari's family has a last name, it's Tamihere!) Also hardcoded mixed race Sully kids and Maori Metkayina kids (Plus Tonowari and Ronal.) Jake is obviously the whitest white guy, Neytiri is african! And Kiri is white herself too.

🌊~*||
creator: Queen.Mother
